introSection: Adrena-Line is a steel inverted roller coaster built by Dutch firm Vekoma currently operating at Six Flags Qiddiya in Al Muzahimiyah, Ar Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Ride page on the park's website

fullText:
Adrena-Line is a steel inverted roller coaster built by Dutch firm Vekoma currently operating at Six Flags Qiddiya in Al Muzahimiyah, Ar Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.


 * Ride page on the park's website
